description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and light gray stripes running parallel across its width. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The striped pattern on the top is consistent and evenly spaced, suggesting a deliberate design, possibly for visual contrast or to serve as a warning or demarcation. The block is thick and robust, with sharp, clean edges and a smooth, unbroken surface. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering. Its substantial size and weight indicate it is likely used as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or parking lots.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with a flat, striped top surface and solid black sides, designed for use as an urban barrier or obstacle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat face with horizontal black and gray stripes and solid black sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the block and the vertical orientation of the stripes from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped pattern and solid black sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and vertical stripes, mirroring view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a visual and physical barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned as part of a row of similar blocks
